message:
feat(layout): implement grouped block-beta grid placement with subgraph-aware layout

Add BlockBetaGridItem enum and layout_block_beta_grouped_items function to
handle proper grid placement of nodes within their parent subgraphs. When
block-beta diagrams contain groups with grid_span, the new grouped layout
algorithm places items respecting their subgraph hierarchy and column spans
rather than treating all nodes as flat peers. Also add grid_span: 1 defaults
to all existing test fixtures in fm-core and fm-render-svg for the new
struct field introduced in the prior commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
